projectOverviewBand.heading: Project Overview Band
projectOverviewBand.projectGoal: preserve the V1.2 installable standard harness baseline while defining the approved V1.3 direction where PMW remains a separate installable multi-project operator console, workflow Markdown becomes explicit agent-role contracts, and reusable profiles PRF-04 through PRF-09 stay intact
projectOverviewBand.currentFocus: DEV-08 packet exit closeout is approved; PLN-07 should select the next V1.3 planning step.

completedItems.title: Deep interview
completedItems.notes: Requirements-critical decisions are closed.

completedItems.title: Requirements freeze
completedItems.notes: Requirements baseline is frozen and synced downstream.

completedItems.title: Architecture / implementation / UI sync
completedItems.notes: Standardized artifact structure is now the active operating shape.

completedItems.title: Core / profile / project activation contract
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after defining the layer activation contract, explicit profile activation rule, required reading order, packet layer fields, and downstream output map.

completedItems.title: Domain foundation gate
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after turning `reference/artifacts/DOMAIN_CONTEXT.md` into the standard domain foundation reference and requiring packet-level domain foundation path, schema impact, and existing-schema compatibility evidence without promoting any project-specific schema into core.

completedItems.title: Authoritative source contract
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after turning `reference/artifacts/AUTHORITATIVE_SOURCE_INTAKE.md` into the standard source-intake reference and requiring intake path, disposition, conflict summary, and current implementation impact evidence before planning/baseline sync proceeds.

completedItems.title: Multi-profile packet composition contract
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after redefining packet/template/profile citations around `Active profile dependencies`, `Active profile references`, `Profile composition rationale`, and extending validator enforcement to the declared profile-set union across concrete registered task packets.

completedItems.title: Task-packet registration enforcement
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after making validator discover current-contract concrete packet candidates in `reference/packets/`, fail on missing or wrong-category `task_packet` registration, keep validating those packets, and ignore legacy packet files outside the current contract.

completedItems.title: Shared-source rebaseline control
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after adding `reference/artifacts/AUTHORITATIVE_SOURCE_WAVE_LEDGER.md`, packet-level impacted-packet / ledger / disposition / shared-source-wave evidence fields, validator checks for ledger membership and disposition parity, and starter synchronization.

remainingItems.title: V1.3 PMW operator console / workflow-contract planning
remainingItems.notes: Opened on 2026-04-27 to promote the approved V1.3 direction into canonical planning state while preserving the V1.2 installable baseline; `DEV-08` is now closed and Planner should select the next V1.3 planning step.

completedItems.title: Rough mockup / global behavior contract
completedItems.notes: PMW mockup and read-only behavior contract are locked.

completedItems.title: Product UX archetype contract
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after turning `reference/artifacts/PRODUCT_UX_ARCHETYPE.md` into the standard UX archetype reference and requiring archetype path, selected archetype, and deviation status evidence before user-facing planning or packet sync proceeds.

completedItems.title: Work item packet framework
completedItems.notes: Standard packet template and packet lane are in use.

completedItems.title: PMW V1.3 operator console first view
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-05-01 after tester verification, user testing, Developer remediation of the artifact-preview path-boundary finding, sibling-prefix escape regression coverage, and Reviewer re-check approval.

completedItems.title: Workflow contracts and handoff routing
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-05-02 after Reviewer approved packet exit closeout for workflow contracts, PM routing, root/starter sync, and PMW Action Board `nextTask` source-owner route evidence.

completedItems.title: DB foundation
completedItems.notes: Repo-local SQLite store and schema are running.

completedItems.title: Generated state docs and drift validator
completedItems.notes: Deterministic generation and drift validation are running.

completedItems.title: Context restoration read model
completedItems.notes: Context restoration is built from designated summary sources.

completedItems.title: PMW read surface
completedItems.notes: Standardized PMW read-only surface is browser-verified.

completedItems.title: Validator / migration / cutover tooling
completedItems.notes: Validator, migration preview/apply, cutover preflight, and cutover report are implemented and verified against the standardized harness contract on 2026-04-22.

completedItems.title: Standard-template hardening
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-24 after enforcing Node 24 preflight in the launcher and JS init path, restoring green root/starter tests, replacing starter review/test stubs with usable templates, and deleting placeholder-only helper scripts from root and starter.

completedItems.title: Legacy Excel/VBA-MariaDB replacement profile
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-26 as part of the approved standalone business-system harness baseline.

completedItems.title: Python/Django backoffice profile
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-26 as part of the approved standalone business-system harness baseline.

completedItems.title: Workflow/approval application profile
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-26 as part of the approved standalone business-system harness baseline.

completedItems.title: Lightweight web/app profile
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-26 in the cross-project profile hardening addendum.

completedItems.title: Android native app profile
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-26 in the cross-project profile hardening addendum.

completedItems.title: Node/frontend web app profile
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-26 in the cross-project profile hardening addendum.

completedItems.title: Admin grid application profile
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after adding `reference/profiles/PRF-01_ADMIN_GRID_APPLICATION_PROFILE.md`, packet-level active-profile evidence fields, and the rule that project-specific column/permission/report detail stays in the project packet rather than the reusable profile.

completedItems.title: Authoritative spreadsheet source profile
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after adding `reference/profiles/PRF-02_AUTHORITATIVE_SPREADSHEET_SOURCE_PROFILE.md`, packet-level workbook/sheet/range/header trace fields, and the rule that project-specific workbook/formula/import/business translation detail stays in the project packet rather than the reusable profile.

completedItems.title: Airgapped delivery profile
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after adding `reference/profiles/PRF-03_AIRGAPPED_DELIVERY_PROFILE.md`, packet-level transfer-bundle / checksum / offline-dependency / rollback / custody fields, and the rule that site-specific operator/import/runbook detail stays in the project packet rather than the reusable profile.

completedItems.title: V1.2 installable harness / PMW baseline reconciliation
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-27 after reconciling already-implemented installable packaging, separate PMW, PRF-07/08/09 hardening, SSOT/DB truth, and release-baseline validator coverage.

completedItems.title: Security review and remediation
completedItems.notes: Release-bound security review closed on 2026-04-22 after remediating rollback bundle presence enforcement in cutover preflight and re-running clean validator, migration preview, cutover preflight, and cutover report evidence.

completedItems.title: Generated docs parity
completedItems.notes: Automated parity coverage exists and the latest targeted plus full test runs were green on 2026-04-22.

completedItems.title: PMW browser UX / 30-second comprehension check
completedItems.notes: 2026-04-22 headless Chrome evidence showed the header and the 4-card current-situation grid in the initial browser view after the overview switched to a collapsed-by-default first view.

completedItems.title: Profile-aware validator
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after extending validator coverage so the reusable packet template must expose layer/profile/core evidence hooks and each optional profile artifact must expose its required packet evidence surface.

completedItems.title: Architecture / review gate
completedItems.notes: Final review gate closed on 2026-04-22 after aligning the PMW artifact/evidence surface with the active review evidence set; release-ready approval is granted for the current baseline.

completedItems.title: Standard harness generalization review
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after extending validator coverage to `artifact_index` category `task_packet`, synchronizing the starter contracts/manual, and confirming no open generalization review finding remains.

completedItems.title: Simulation remediation review
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after confirming `SIM-01`, `SIM-02`, and `SIM-03` introduced no open reusable drift, starter placeholders remained starter-safe, and root/starter validation stayed clean.

completedItems.title: Standard-template real-world readiness review
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-24 after confirming green root/starter tests, untouched-starter validator behavior (`starter_bootstrap_pending` only), clean launcher help path in root and starter, and no remaining real-world-readiness finding.

completedItems.title: Environment topology contract
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after turning `reference/artifacts/DEPLOYMENT_PLAN.md` into the standard environment topology reference and requiring topology path, source/target environment, execution target, transfer boundary, and rollback boundary evidence before deploy/test/cutover planning or packet sync proceeds.

completedItems.title: Improvement promotion loop
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after turning `.agents/artifacts/PREVENTIVE_MEMORY.md` into the canonical improvement memory surface and requiring target layer, promotion status, linked follow-up item, and human-reviewed promotion boundary before recurring friction can mutate core, profile, or project follow-up work.

completedItems.title: Packet exit quality gate
completedItems.notes: Closed on 2026-04-23 after turning `reference/artifacts/PACKET_EXIT_QUALITY_GATE.md` into the standard packet closeout reference and requiring closeout path, exit recommendation, residual debt, deferred follow-up, and source-parity / cleanup evidence before packet close proceeds.

phaseOne.label: status
phaseOne.description: Summarize the selected project's current stage, gate, and focus.

phaseOne.label: next
phaseOne.description: Show the next recommended action for the selected project.

phaseOne.label: explain
phaseOne.description: Explain the current state and operator-facing rationale.

phaseOne.label: validate
phaseOne.description: Run validator checks against the selected project's current truth surfaces.

phaseOne.label: handoff
phaseOne.description: Launch the next approved workflow for the selected project based on handoff routing.

phaseOne.label: pmw-export
phaseOne.description: Regenerate the selected project's PMW read-model and manifest artifacts.

terminalOnly.label: doctor
terminalOnly.description: Run environment and operator readiness checks from the selected project's terminal.

terminalOnly.label: test
terminalOnly.description: Run the selected project's test suite from the terminal until PMW command-panel support is added.

terminalOnly.label: validation-report
terminalOnly.description: Persist validation evidence from the terminal until PMW command-panel support is added.

notes: PMW is a launcher and result-viewer surface, not the canonical write authority.
Terminal-only commands must run from the selected project's repo root.
